title: psoralea accrescens
intro: Psoralea accrescens, also known as the goat's thorn or bishop's weed, is a plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate hormone production and improve reproductive health. The health benefits of Psoralea accrescens include its potential to treat infertility, menopausal symptoms, and osteoporosis, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Psoralea accrescens include teas, tinctures, and capsules, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
